result.stdout:
Usage: PdfToolCli <Command>

Commands:
  info count      Show page count of the pdf file.
  merge files     Merge pdf files
  rotate all      Rotate all pages.
  rotate pages    Rotate the specified pages.
  select pages    Select the specified pages from pdf and save to file.
  help            Display help.
  version         Display version.

commands.payload:
Usage: PdfToolCli <Command>

Commands:
  info count      Show page count of the pdf file.
  merge files     Merge pdf files
  rotate all      Rotate all pages.
  rotate pages    Rotate the specified pages.
  select pages    Select the specified pages from pdf and save to file.
  help            Display help.
  version         Display version.

result.stdout:
Usage: PdfToolCli info count <[0]>

Show page count of the pdf file.

Arguments:
  [0] <String>

commands.payload:
Usage: PdfToolCli info count <[0]>

Show page count of the pdf file.

Arguments:
  [0] <String>

result.stdout:
Usage: PdfToolCli merge files <pdf file path1,path2,path3,....> [options...]

Merge pdf files

Arguments:
  [0] <String[]>    pdf file path1,path2,path3,....

Options:
  -o, -output <String>    output file path (Default: )

commands.payload:

Options:

result.stdout:
Usage: PdfToolCli rotate all <pdf file path> <angle> [options...]

Rotate all pages.

Arguments:
  [0] <String>    pdf file path
  [1] <Int32>     angle

Options:
  -o, -output <String>    output file path (Default: )

result.stdout:
Usage: PdfToolCli rotate pages <pdf file path> <pageNum1:angle1,pageNum2:angle2,...> [options...]

Rotate the specified pages.

Arguments:
  [0] <String>      pdf file path
  [1] <String[]>    pageNum1:angle1,pageNum2:angle2,...

Options:
  -o, -output <String>    output file path (Default: )

result.stdout:
Usage: PdfToolCli select pages <pdf file path> <num1,num2,num3,...> [options...]

Select the specified pages from pdf and save to file.

Arguments:
  [0] <String>      pdf file path
  [1] <String[]>    num1,num2,num3,...

Options:
  -o, -output <String>    output file (Default: )
